---
title: "Glance Reading"
format: html
---

# Data reading

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

csv_files <- dir("data", pattern = "*.csv", full.names = T, recursive = T)

read_gr <- function(f) {
  read_csv(f) |> 
    filter(!is.na(xPos)) |> 
    select(xPos, stimulusSet, whichImage, thisN, blockNumber, direction, angle, stimulus, response, correct, participant) |> 
    mutate(blockNumber = as.factor(blockNumber))
    
}

D_0 <- csv_files |> map_df(read_gr)


```

```{r}
D_0 |> 
  group_by(participant, angle, blockNumber) |>
  summarize(p_correct = mean(correct),
            n_Obs = n()) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = angle, color = blockNumber, y = n_Obs )) +
  facet_wrap(~participant) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line()
  
```
